symptom_vector: node disk full with high disk utilization and disk space exhaustion

expert_knowledge.root_cause_desc: aiops-k8s-08 节点因 node_filesystem_usage_rate 指标异常飙升至80.83%导致磁盘空间耗尽
reasoning_chain: Step 1: 观察到 aiops-k8s-08 节点的 node_filesystem_usage_rate 指标从正常值53.67%异常飙升至80.83%，增长40.39%
Step 2: 分析 aiops-k8s-08 节点同时出现 node_cpu_usage_rate 从16.92%上升至28.98%，表明节点资源压力
Step 3: 确认该节点上运行的 redis-cart-0 等服务出现响应时间增加，符合节点资源瓶颈导致的级联影响

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Sudden increase from baseline to high level (e.g., >80%)
critical_checks.instruction: 检查 aiops-k8s-08 节点的 node_filesystem_usage_rate 指标是否异常飙升，重点关注是否超过80%阈值
